basic_details.job_title: GHSS Niljee Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Govt. Higher Secondary School, Niljee (GHSS Niljee)
basic_details.short_information: Govt. Higher Secondary School, Niljee (GHSS Niljee) Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 05 June 2026 on the official website https://nuapada.odisha.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GHSS Niljee Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade, B.Ed or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi
qualification.details: Master Degree in the concerned subject with at least 50% marks or equivalent grade. B.Ed or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi.

selection_process: Carrier Assessment Teaching Experience Basic Computer Knowledge Merit List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GHSS Niljee Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://nuapada.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GHSS Niljee Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculty positions at GHSS Niljee is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in the relevant subject with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed. or equivalent degree recognized by NCTE New Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Guest Faculty posts is 65 years. Age relaxation details, if any, should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Carrier Assessment, evaluation of Teaching Experience, assessment of Basic Computer Knowledge, and finally, the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for GHSS Niljee Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Guest Faculty position at Govt. Higher Secondary School, Niljee.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Nuapada District, Odisha: https://nuapada.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents, including your photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. When is the document verification scheduled?
faq.answer: The document verification for the shortlisted candidates is scheduled to take place on 12th June 2026.
